use_codes.desc: USE OF VITAL DYE FOR FACILITATING SURGICAL PROCEDURES FOR VITREO-RETINAL SURGERY
USE IN IDENTIFICATION OF INTRAOCULAR MEMBRANES TO FACILITATE REMOVAL DURING OPHTHALMIC SURGERY

indications.text:
MembraneBlue™ 0.15% is indicated for use as an aid in ophthalmic surgery by staining the epiretinal
membranes during ophthalmic surgical vitrectomy procedures, facilitating removal of the tissue in adults
and pediatric patients.

MembraneBlue™ 0.15% is indicated for use as an aid in ophthalmic surgery by staining the epiretinal membranes
during ophthalmic surgical vitrectomy procedures, facilitating removal of the tissue.
